products.name: Abby
products.description: Abby is a bear from the 2025 Charlie Bears collection, lovingly handmade by skilled teddy artisans in Thailand. He is a delightful teddy bear, measuring just under 40 cm. His fur showcases a soft, wavy texture in a gentle beige shade, while his face is characterized by soulful, dark eyes and a plush, rounded nose. A charming plaid scarf around his neck adds a subtle touch of charm to his endearing presence. Abby is 56 cm tall from head to toe and weighs a hefty 1685 g, and she feels soft in hands. All that makes her perfect for holding and hugging. She can be played with by children over 3 years of age - and adults too. Key features Limited edition of 1000 Only 1000 will ever be made, which makes Abby more collectable. Handmade Expertly handmade by highly skilled artisans, which makes every teddy unique. Polyfill and pellet stuffing Stuffed with polyester fibre for softness and plastic pellets for weight. Made of Plumo This teddy is made of plumo, which is a special mix of plush and mohair or alpaca used by Charlie Bears. Sitting pose This teddy likes to sit comfortably, and doesn't have good enough balance for standing. Fully jointed All five joints turn, so this teddy's head, arms and legs can be posed in multiple positions. Accessories scarf

All that makes them perfect for carrying in a pocket. They can be played with by children of all ages. Key features Polyfill and pellet stuffing Stuffed with polyester fibre for softness and plastic pellets for weight. Machine washable This teddy can handle machine washing, but make sure you follow the instructions. Sitting pose This teddy likes to sit comfortably, and doesn't have good enough balance for standing. Not jointed None of the joints move, so this teddy can't be positioned in many ways. Made of plush Plush is very soft synthetic fabric, which is comfortable and pleasant to the touch.

Tigerlilly is 19 cm tall from head to toe and weigh a light 270 g, and they feel firm in hands. All that makes them perfect for displaying on shelf. They are not a toy, and not suitable for children under 14 years of age. Key features Limited edition of 1200 Only 1200 will ever be made, which makes Tigerlilly more collectable. Handmade Expertly handmade by highly skilled artisans, which makes every teddy unique. Flexible pose This teddy can be set to sitting or standing pose. Made of mohair Mohair is a durable fabric used on the finest teddies, made from the hair of the Angora goat. Fully jointed All five joints turn, so this teddy's head, arms and legs can be posed in multiple positions. Accessories key necklace
